requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — BIS IS / CISPR Requirements for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容性（EMC）——BIS IS/CISPR对电动汽车充电桩的要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容性（EMC）——BIS IS/CISPR對電動汽車充電樁的要求

summary.en: EV chargers exported to India must comply with applicable Indian EMC standards administered by BIS. The primary applicable standards are IS/IEC 61851-21-1 (EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems, conductive connection to the AC/DC supply — Part 21-1: off-board EV charging systems up to 11 kW) and IS/IEC 61851-21-2 (Part 21-2: off-board EV charging systems above 11 kW, including DC fast chargers). For conducted and radiated emissions, IS/CISPR 11 (industrial, scientific and medical equipment) and IS/CISPR 14 (household and similar electrical appliances) may be applicable depending on charger classification. The MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024 enforces BIS conformity assessment for EV charging equipment under IS 17017, and EMC evidence forms part of the BIS registration file where applicable.
summary.zh: 出口印度的电动汽车充电桩须符合BIS管理的适用印度EMC标准。主要适用标准为IS/IEC 61851-21-1（非车载电动汽车充电系统EMC要求，传导连接至交/直流电源——第21-1部分：11kW以下非车载充电系统）及IS/IEC 61851-21-2（第21-2部分：11kW以上非车载充电系统，含直流快充）。就传导及辐射骚扰而言，根据充电桩分类，可能适用IS/CISPR 11（工业、科学和医疗设备）或IS/CISPR 14（家用及类似电器）。重工业部《电气设备（质量控制）令，2024》依据IS 17017对电动汽车充电设备强制实施BIS合格评定，适用时EMC证据构成BIS注册文件的一部分。
summary.zht: 出口印度的電動汽車充電樁須符合BIS管理的適用印度EMC標準。主要適用標準為IS/IEC 61851-21-1（非車載電動汽車充電系統EMC要求，傳導連接至交/直流電源——第21-1部分：11kW以下非車載充電系統）及IS/IEC 61851-21-2（第21-2部分：11kW以上非車載充電系統，含直流快充）。就傳導及輻射騷擾而言，根據充電樁分類，可能適用IS/CISPR 11（工業、科學和醫療設備）或IS/CISPR 14（家用及類似電器）。重工業部《電氣設備（質量控制）令，2024》依據IS 17017對電動汽車充電設備強制實施BIS合格評定，適用時EMC證據構成BIS登記文件的一部分。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024 — Ministry of Heavy Industries; BIS conformity assessment for EV charging equipment under IS 17017
IS/IEC 61851-21-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-1: EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems up to 11 kW (BIS/IEC)
IS/IEC 61851-21-2 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-2: EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems above 11 kW (BIS/IEC)
IS/CISPR 11 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment — Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics (BIS/CISPR, as applicable by product classification)
BIS Act 2016 and BIS (Conformity Assessment) Regulations 2018 — CRS Scheme-II registration framework

summary.en: China addresses EV charger EMC through GB/T 18487.2-2017 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — EMC requirements, aligned with IEC 61851-21) and the general Chinese EMC standard GB 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics) where applicable. Since 1 March 2025, EV charger EMC is covered under the mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scope under CNCA-C25-01:2024. Chinese CCC EMC test reports to GB/T 18487.2 or GB 9254 are not accepted as substitutes for BIS EMC requirements under Indian IS/CISPR standards.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB/T 18487.2-2017（电动汽车传导充电系统——EMC要求，与IEC 61851-21协调）处理电动汽车充电桩EMC事宜，适用情形下还援引通用中国EMC标准GB 9254（信息技术设备——无线电骚扰特性）。自2025年3月1日起，充电桩EMC已纳入CNCA-C25-01:2024强制性3C认证范围。依据GB/T 18487.2或GB 9254出具的中国3C EMC检测报告，不被接受作为印度IS/CISPR标准下BIS EMC要求的替代。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB/T 18487.2-2017（電動汽車傳導充電系統——EMC要求，與IEC 61851-21協調）處理電動汽車充電樁EMC事宜，適用情形下還援引通用中國EMC標準GB 9254（資訊技術設備——無線電騷擾特性）。自2025年3月1日起，充電樁EMC已納入CNCA-C25-01:2024強制性3C認證範圍。依據GB/T 18487.2或GB 9254出具的中國3C EMC檢測報告，不被接受作為印度IS/CISPR標準下BIS EMC要求的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.2-2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — EMC requirements (SAMR/SAC, aligned with IEC 61851-21)
GB 9254-2021 — Limits and measurement methods for radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment (SAMR/SAC)
CNCA-C25-01:2024 — CCC certification scope for EV charging equipment including EMC (mandatory from 1 March 2025)

gap.en: India's EMC requirements for EV chargers are based on IS/IEC 61851-21-1 and 21-2 (and CISPR standards where applicable), which are IEC-aligned but require testing through BIS-recognised laboratories and BIS CRS Scheme-II registration under the 2024 QCO. Chinese GB/T 18487.2 is also IEC-aligned, meaning technical overlap exists — but Chinese CCC EMC reports do not satisfy BIS registration requirements. Exporters with existing IEC 61851-21-1/-21-2 test reports from ILAC MRA-member labs may be able to leverage those reports to reduce retesting scope during BIS registration, but acceptance must be confirmed with BIS for the applicable registration file. The key documentation gap is obtaining a BIS-issued registration certificate with EMC evidence included where applicable.
gap.zh: 印度对电动汽车充电桩的EMC要求基于IS/IEC 61851-21-1及21-2（适用时还包括CISPR标准），与IEC协调，但须通过BIS认可实验室检测并依据2024年质量控制令取得BIS CRS Scheme-II注册。中国GB/T 18487.2同样与IEC协调，因此存在技术重叠——但中国3C EMC报告不满足BIS注册要求。持有ILAC MRA成员实验室出具的现有IEC 61851-21-1/-21-2检测报告的出口商，在BIS注册过程中可能可以借助这些报告缩减重新检测范围，但须就适用注册文件向BIS确认。关键文件差距在于取得BIS颁发的注册证书，并在适用时纳入EMC证据。
gap.zht: 印度對電動汽車充電樁的EMC要求基於IS/IEC 61851-21-1及21-2（適用時還包括CISPR標準），與IEC協調，但須通過BIS認可實驗室檢測並依據2024年質量控制令取得BIS CRS Scheme-II登記。中國GB/T 18487.2同樣與IEC協調，因此存在技術重疊——但中國3C EMC報告不滿足BIS登記要求。持有ILAC MRA成員實驗室出具的現有IEC 61851-21-1/-21-2檢測報告的出口商，在BIS登記過程中可能可以借助這些報告縮減重新檢測範圍，但須就適用登記文件向BIS確認。關鍵文件差距在於取得BIS頒發的登記證書，並在適用時納入EMC證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC evidence must support BIS CRS Scheme-II registration for EV charging equipment under the MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024 and IS 17017, where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 18487.2-2017 EMC requirements; covered under CCC mandatory certification from 1 March 2025 (CNCA-C25-01:2024)

source.publisher: Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) — Electrotechnical Department

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance for EV chargers in India requires testing to IS/IEC 61851-21-1 or 21-2 (depending on charger output rating) by BIS-recognised laboratories, with BIS CRS Scheme-II registration as the formal compliance evidence under the MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024. Chinese CCC EMC certificates to GB/T 18487.2 are not substitutes. Technical alignment between IS/IEC 61851-21 and GB/T 18487.2 (both IEC-based) may allow partial test data reuse, but acceptance must be confirmed with BIS for the registration file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】印度电动汽车充电桩EMC合规要求由BIS认可实验室依据IS/IEC 61851-21-1或21-2（视充电桩额定输出而定）进行检测，并依据重工业部《电气设备（质量控制）令，2024》以BIS CRS Scheme-II注册作为正式合规证明。依据GB/T 18487.2的中国3C EMC证书不可替代。IS/IEC 61851-21与GB/T 18487.2（均基于IEC）之间的技术对齐可能允许部分检测数据复用，但须就注册文件向BIS确认接受情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】印度電動汽車充電樁EMC合規要求由BIS認可實驗室依據IS/IEC 61851-21-1或21-2（視充電樁額定輸出而定）進行檢測，並依據重工業部《電氣設備（質量控制）令，2024》以BIS CRS Scheme-II登記作為正式合規證明。依據GB/T 18487.2的中國3C EMC證書不可替代。IS/IEC 61851-21與GB/T 18487.2（均基於IEC）之間的技術對齊可能允許部分檢測數據複用，但須就登記文件向BIS確認接受情況。
